name: Microsoft Office DLL Sideloading
notes:
This rule detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of Microsoft Office from non standard location

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Wietze Beukema (project and research)
SIGMA Title: Microsoft Office DLL Sideload
SIGMA Description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of Microsoft Office from non standard location


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of outllib.dll

when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of [\Program Files\Microsoft Office\OFFICE or \Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\OFFICE or \Program Files\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE or \Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE]
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Office DLL Sideloading on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of outllib.dll

AND NOT when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of [\Program Files\Microsoft Office\OFFICE or \Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\OFFICE or \Program Files\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE or \Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE]
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Office DLL Sideloading
Event description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of Microsoft Office from non standard location
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
